p:tag.name: MMPROD_UIDATA
p:tag.val:
<database version="6.0"><object type="1" unique_id="10001"><object type="8" unique_id="10435"></object><object type="2" unique_id="10436"><object type="3" unique_id="10437"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 1 - "Welcome to the CAS
PowerPoint template!""/><property id="20307" value="286"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10438"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 2 - "Update your footer""/><property id="20307" value="258"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10439"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 3 - "Use bullets sparingly, if at all""/><property id="20307" value="306"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10440"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 4 - "Use bullets sparingly, if at all""/><property id="20307" value="307"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10441"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 5 - "The temporary grid serves as an underlying structure for your layouts""/><property id="20307" value="299"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10442"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 6 - "Fill a screen completely with an image if it powers your story forward – do not use the Monogram and tagline lock-u"/><property id="20307" value="271"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10443"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 7 - "“This is a powerful way to present a meaningful quote with an image”
Attribution Position""/><property id="20307" value="272"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10444"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 8 - "Example of charts""/><property id="20307" value="302"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10445"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 9 - "Example of charts""/><property id="20307" value="303"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10446"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 10 - "Example of charts""/><property id="20307" value="304"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10447"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 11 - "Example of charts""/><property id="20307" value="305"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10448"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 12 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="310"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10449"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 13 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="311"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10450"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 14 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="312"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10451"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 15 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="313"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10452"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 16 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="314"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10453"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 17 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="315"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10454"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 18 - "Use divider slides to separate different sections of your pitch""/><property id="20307" value="316"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10455"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 19 - "Colors in this template (RGB)""/><property id="20307" value="290"/></object><object type="3" unique_id="10456"><property id="20148" value="5"/><property id="20300" value="Slide 20"/><property id="20307" value="309"/></object></object></object></database>
